svg.style: background: #ffffff; background-color: light-dark(#ffffff, var(--ge-dark-color, #121212)); color-scheme: light dark;
svg.content: <mxfile host="Electron" scale="1" border="0"> <diagram id="ardurover-arch" name="ArduRover Architecture"> <mxGraphModel dx="958" dy="523" grid="1" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="1" page="1" pageScale="1" pageWidth="960" pageHeight="720" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="app" parent="1" height="66" width="640" x="198" y="188" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="mission" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d9ead3;strokeColor=#000000;fontSize=13;" value="<b>Mission Planner</b>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="30" width="345" x="314" y="198" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="autopilot" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f3f3f3;strokeColor=#000000;align=left;verticalAlign=top;fontSize=14;fontStyle=1;spacingLeft=12;spacingTop=8;arcSize=4;" value="USV" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="320" width="770" x="200" y="270" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="gnc" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#cfe2f3;strokeColor=#000000;align=left;verticalAlign=top;fontSize=12;fontStyle=1;spacingLeft=10;spacingTop=6;opacity=70;arcSize=7;" value="Autopilot" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="251" width="603" x="260" y="280" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="nav" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d9d2e9;strokeColor=#000000;fontSize=13;" value="<b>Mission Execution Layer</b><div>Manage wayoint queue</div>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="42" width="285" x="344" y="291" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="pos" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d9d2e9;strokeColor=#000000;fontSize=13;" value="<b>Guidance style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d9d2e9;strokeColor=#000000;align=center;verticalAlign=top;fontSize=13;fontStyle=1;spacingTop=4;" value="Stabilization Layer" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry
